name: idrs-erp-system
description: Unified ERP System Runner for IDRS Modules

scripts.install:all: npm run install:admin:bg && npm run install:admin:fg && npm run install:student:bg && npm run install:student:fg && npm run install:faculty:bg && npm run install:faculty:fg && npm run install:alumni:bg && npm run install:alumni:fg && npm run install:erp
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:admin:bg" "npm run start:student:bg" "npm run start:faculty:bg" "npm run start:alumni:bg" "npm run start:admin:fg" "npm run start:student:fg" "npm run start:faculty:fg" "npm run start:alumni:fg" "npm run start:erp"
